offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized receipts cause delayed payments. We automate receipt categorization and report submission instead of manual tracking.
problem: Difficulty in categorizing and coding receipts for expense reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 freelancers with demo video
Community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
